debug_info.goal:
pbar : Pose
ε : ℝ
poly : GoodPoly
pc : GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition poly pbar ε
⊢ ‖GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.S poly pbar ε pc‖ *
      nth_partial 2 (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu pbar ε poly pc) pbar.innerParams =
    inner ℝ (pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.S poly pbar ε pc)))
      (GlobalTheorem.GlobalTheoremPrecondition.w poly pbar ε pc)

proof:
have := pc.norm_S_ne_zero
  change ‖pc.S‖ * nth_partial 2 (fun x => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w x) pbar.innerParams = _
  have hf : DifferentiableAt ℝ (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams := by
    fun_prop
  have hfd :
      (fderiv ℝ (rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w) pbar.innerParams) (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) =
        ‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
    change (fderiv ℝ (λ x => rotproj_inner_unit pc.S pc.w x) _) _ = _
    unfold rotproj_inner_unit rotprojRM
    convert_to (fderiv ℝ (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ • (rotproj_inner pc.S pc.w)) pbar.innerParams)
        (EuclideanSpace.single 2 1) = _
    · unfold rotproj_inner rotprojRM
      conv =>
        rhs; arg 1; lhs; ext x; simp only [Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul]
        rw [inv_mul_eq_div]
    rw [(hf.hasFDerivAt.const_smul ‖pc.S‖⁻¹).fderiv]
    simp only [Fin.isValue, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_smul', Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul,
      mul_eq_mul_left_iff]
    left
    rw [HasFDerivAt.rotproj_inner pbar pc.S pc.w |>.fderiv]
    simp [rotproj_inner']
  simp only [nth_partial, GlobalTheoremPrecondition.fu, Fin.isValue] at hfd ⊢
  have : ‖pc.S‖ * (‖pc.S‖⁻¹ * ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫) =
      ⟪pbar.rotR (pbar.rotM₁φ pc.S), pc.w⟫ := by
    field_simp
  simpa [hfd, mul_assoc] using this
